meaning: adj.翠绿的,青翠的,生疏的,没有经验的
examples: Along the way, we despoiled most of the land we worked, often turning verdant, natural ecozones into semi-arid deserts.
On all sides, verdant sunset-bathed hills greet the eye.
Small children played happily in verdant parks.
However you make it to the summit, revel in the panoramic views across the verdant Surrey countryside.
This verdant riff on the original celebrates all shades of summer green loud and proud.
